case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 297 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag „A‟ 2. For hearing of CMA No.1352/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 03.04.2025 Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kuber, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< On 28.03.2023, the following order was passed;- “None present for the petitioners; however, as an indulgence, one week’s time is granted for compliance of office note. Adjourned.” Thereafter two years have been passed neither petitioners nor their Counsel have turned up to proceed with this Petition. However, looking to the issue involved in this Petition and the impugned action referred therein this Petition has now become infructuous. Since no one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioners, therefore, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
